text1:
Are you tired of watching your hair thinning out, strand by strand? Frustrated that endless supplements and pills are not making any difference for you? Mesotherapy treatment for hair loss could be the affordable game-changing solution you need. This treatment can boost both your hair and confidence.

Mesotherapy is a minimally invasive gentle cosmetic procedure that stimulates hair follicles using nutritional support. It creates strengthening and healthier conditions for hair growth.

As a non-surgical and painless procedure, mesotherapy in Turkey is considered one of the most popular treatments that can not only prevent hair loss but also promote healthy hair growth. To help you with your struggles with hair loss, our expert cosmetic physicians at <color>Asli Tarcan</color> clinic specializes in nourishing and strengthening your hair with mesotherapy sessions in Turkey.
text2:
Mesotherapy is the least invasive, thus painless cosmetic treatment. It involves injecting a customized mixture of vitamins, enzymes, hormones, biotin, and natural extracts such as saw palmetto into the mesoderm (middle layer of skin).

Unlike oral pills and topical supplements such as Minoxidil, you can get fast results with mesotherapy for treating your hair loss.

The mesoderm is a middle layer of skin where hair follicles are located. Our professionals expertly inject very fine micro needles at a depth of 2–3 millimeters in the mesoderm to deliver these bioactive substances directly to the target area.
title2: What are Benefits of Mesotherapy for Hair Loss?
text3: Scalp mesotherapy is an effective treatment for hair loss that offers multiple benefits. It nourishes hair roots, enhancing shine and quality while stimulating new hair growth for a fuller appearance. Get the beauty of your hair back with hair mesotherapy in Turkey! These mesotherapy sessions will also provide you many other benefits, such as: • Hair Nourishment: Provide deep nourishment to the roots of hairs, thus enhancing hair shine and quality • Hair Growth Stimulation: Nourishes hair follicles directly to stimulate new hair growth and makes your hair look fuller • Hair Loss Treatment: Help in hair regrowth due to post-surgery hair loss, chemical damage, heat styling damage, age-related thinning, menopausal hair changes • Hair Thickness: Reduces hair fall/shedding, increases hair thickness, and improves hair strength and texture • Extended Growth: Extends hair growth phase (anagen phase) • Follicle Revival: Reactivates dormant follicles and helps clear blocked follicles • Improved Circulation: Improves blood circulation in the scalp • Scalp Health: Reduces dryness, itching, and scalp inflammation • Inflammation Reduction: Scalp Help in the treatment of seborrheic dermatitis (dandruff), mild scalp psoriasis, folliculitis (inflammation) • Sebum Regulation: Creates a healthier scalp environment to balance the oil production • DHT Blocking: Mesotherapy solutions can help block DHT (a hormone that can shrink your hair follicles)
title3: What Ingredients Boost Hair Growth in Mesotherapy?
text4: Injection cocktails for Mesotherapy for hair loss are customized according to the need and condition of your scalp. They contain very beneficial active ingredients, such as: • Vitamin Complex: Contains vitamins B, C, E, Hyaluronic Acid • Mineral Solution: Contains zinc, magnesium, copper • Amino Acid Mixture: Contains building blocks for hair proteins • Biotin Solution: Contains vitamin H for hair strength • Peptide Complex: Contains growth factors • Coenzymes: For hair vitality
title4: Am I the Right Candidate For Hair Loss Mesotherapy?
text5:
You may be a suitable candidate for mesotherapy hair regrowth treatment if you meet specific criteria. The following conditions indicate a need for targeted scalp and hair follicle rejuvenation:

• Adults experiencing gradual hair loss
• If you are facing extreme hair fall due to:
  - Aging
  - Chemotherapy
  - Menopause
  - Weight loss
  - PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)
  - Chemical treatments (perming, straightening)
  - Post-pregnancy
  - Stress-related hair loss (Telogen Effluvium)
• Suffering from androgenetic alopecia (pattern baldness)
• If you had no response to topical treatments
• Your hair has lost shine and beauty
text6:
As mentioned, the mesotherapy hair treatment is simple, less time-consuming, and painless. The whole process consists of several sessions depending on your scalp and hair’s status. Our experts at Aslı Tarcan will carry out each session, taking no more than 40 minutes.

<header>Step 1: Consultation and Assessment</header>
In consultation, the doctor will analyze your scalp and hair health to find out the main issue compromising your hair health. We will discuss your medical history, other conditions and requirements. Your first session may be scheduled after making a detailed diagnosis.

<header>Step 2: Customized Treatment Plan</header>
Based on the assessment, we create a mesotherapy cocktail designed to target your unique needs. This mix may include a blend of vitamins, minerals, amino acids, and natural extracts. These are chosen appropriately to nourish your scalp, stimulate your hair follicles, and promote new hair growth.

<header>Step 3: Scalp Preparation & Cleansing</header>
Our staff starts the process by cleaning your scalp thoroughly to ensure it’s free of oils or residues. If you are pain-sensitive, we have an option to use local anesthesia or numbing cream at the injection site, to ease your discomfort.

<header>Step 4: Micro-Injections of Nutrient Solution</header>
Using specialized, ultra-thin needles, our skilled dermatologists will administer small injections of the nutrient-rich solution directly into the scalp’s dermal layer only 2-3 mm deep. These micro-injections will focus on the areas where you are experiencing thinning or hair loss.

<header>Step 5: Follow-Up Care</header>
We provide detailed post-treatment guidelines to help maintain good results and ensure your smooth recovery. Our team advises on gentle scalp care, avoiding harsh chemicals, and any recommended products. Additionally, we schedule follow-up sessions as needed to track progress and make adjustments for optimal results.

<header>Step 6: Immediate Care After Procedure</header>
Right after the mesotherapy session, our trained nursing staff gently cleanse the treated area to remove any residue.

After each mesotherapy session, we provide our clients with immediate care instructions. We always make sure to support a comfortable recovery and enhance the hair loss treatment’s effectiveness.
title6: How to Care for Your Scalp Post-Mesotherapy?
text7: After your mesotherapy session, follow these essential care guidelines to maximize your comfort and results: • Avoid Washing the Scalp: Do not wash your scalp for at least 24–48 hours after every session. This will ensure that the injected nutrients will not wash away and have enough time to be fully absorbed in the scalp. • No Hair Products: Never use any hair styling products, dyes, or chemical treatments for the first 48 hours. It may cause irritation and minimize the results. Moreover, avoid styling your hair using straightener, curling iron, or perming tools. • Minimize Sun Exposure: Try to avoid direct sunlight on the treated area. If you need to be outside, wearing a hat or scarf made up of soft fabric can provide you extra protection. • Limit Physical Activity: For the first 24 hours, we recommend avoiding heavy exercise, saunas, and hot showers. It is necessary to reduce sweating, which may irritate the scalp. • Stay Hydrated: Drinking plenty of water will support scalp health. It will ease your overall recovery after the treatment. • Never scratch your scalp: Your scalp could be a bit itchy after the procedure, but you should not unnecessarily scratch or touch the treated area on your scalp within the initial 24 hours after a mesotherapy session. • Monitor for Reactions: You should keep monitoring your scalp for any unusual reactions. Although it’s rare, you may observe prolonged redness or swelling. If you experience significant discomfort or other concerning symptoms, contact our clinic for advice.
title7: What Will I Experience After Mesotherapy for Hair Loss?
text8: When you undergo mesotherapy for hair loss, you may experience a few temporary side effects as your scalp adjusts to this treatment. Here’s a closer look at what you might feel: • Temporary Scalp Tenderness: You may notice some tenderness in the treated area, similar to the sensation after a workout. This is a normal response to micro-injections and will go away within a few hours to a couple of days. • Mild Swelling: Swelling around the injection sites may occur as a natural response to the treatment. You should keep your head elevated and apply a gentle cold compress to minimize swelling if it occurs. • Minor Bruising: Some individuals may experience minor bruising at the injection sites. This is usually not severe and can be managed with cold compresses. It is temporary and will fade away within a few days. • Itching: Mild itching at the treatment site is common as the scalp heals. Avoid scratching the area harshly. If itching persists or becomes severe, you should consult us for advice. • Redness at Injection Sites: It’s normal to have some redness in the areas where micro-injections were administered. This redness usually lightens within a few hours after the procedure.
text9:
Mesotherapy may not be suitable for everyone. You should avoid opting for mesotherapy sessions for treating your scalp issues or hair loss if you have any of the following conditions:

• Advanced scarring alopecia
• Uncontrolled diabetes
• Burns or bruises on your scalp
• Pregnancy, lactating child, or if you are menstruating
• Benign or Malignant tumors
• Ongoing chemotherapy treatments
• Allergies to any ingredient in the mesotherapy cocktail
• Endocrine disorders (adrenal and thyroid disorders)
• Severe bleeding psoriasis/eczema
• Any bleeding disorders or if you are using blood thinners
text10: How long will the result of my mesotherapy sessions last? After completing the prescribed number of mesotherapy sessions, the results can last for 2–3 years. You can expect good hair health for a longer time period with proper hair care post mesotherapy. Is mesotherapy better than PRP? Being less painful, and affordable mesotherapy is considered better than PRP for hair loss. How Many Mesotherapy Sessions Will I Need? Our expert cosmetologists at Aslı Tarcan will suggest the number of the required sessions after a detailed diagnosis of the health of your scalp and hair. But generally, treatment of hair loss is carried out with approx. 10 mesotherapy sessions, each after a gap of 15 days. When can I wash my hair after a mesotherapy session? You can wash your hair after a few hours of mesotherapy sessions. Experts recommend waiting for approx. 24 hours is good. Is mesotherapy expensive? Mesotherapy for hair loss is an affordable procedure. In Turkey, Aslı Tarcan offers expert conducted sessions of mesotherapy at reasonable cost. Is there any age limit for mesotherapy for hair loss? It is recommended for people aged 18+, although people less than 18 years can also undergo mesotherapy sessions if recommended by doctors. Should I avoid spicy food after mesotherapy? Mesotherapy is a simple procedure. No food restrictions are suggested as after care. Is mesotherapy effective for hair loss after pregnancy? Yes, it can help you regain your hair growth, you have lost due to hormonal changes in pregnancy. Is mesotherapy safe for hair loss after perming? Yes, mesotherapy is very effective to treat hair loss due to side effects of perming or any other hair styling procedure.
